7. TOTAL_BUDGET: ✓ Fully specified - Complete cost breakdown provided (€870, which is under the €900 limit)

While activities are provided with costs, the absence of restaurants means the activities section is incomplete relative to the user's request. That said, the format itself only asks for 'activities' not specifically restaurants, so if we're strictly evaluating against the format (not the user task), then activities are provided.

Strictly evaluating against the provided format (not the user task): All 7 items are present with full specifications including costs.
